title: Nginx SPA History Fallback Example
summary: Serve a single-page app with history fallback in Nginx.
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Replace the sample document root with a real SPA build directory before validation.
Ensure the Nginx worker user and any host security policy can read the configured directory before validation.
Keep more specific API or upload locations outside this catch-all before validation.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. The example follows the official Nginx try_files directive behavior, but it still requires nginx -t and a real SPA build on a staging host before use.
